name: development-plugin-for-avalonia
description: Build, review, design, port, and migrate Avalonia applications through focused skills for app architecture, styling, rendering, platform services, design systems, and framework migration.

interface.shortDescription: Focused skills for building and porting Avalonia apps
interface.longDescription: Use Development Plugin for Avalonia to build or review Avalonia applications, route work into focused startup, styling, rendering, platform, and testing workflows, and handle HTML/CSS, WinForms, WPF, WinUI, and Avalonia 12 migration lanes without drifting away from the pinned Avalonia 11.3.12 guidance.
defaultPrompt: Build a modern Avalonia app and route the work to the right specialist skill
Port this WPF, WinForms, WinUI, or HTML UI to Avalonia
Review an Avalonia project for AOT-safe bindings, styling, and performance
